findings.evidence: `rg`/line hits: `SemilocallySimplyConnected.lean:427` states `Path.exists_partition_in_slsc_neighborhoods` with `SemilocallySimplyConnectedOn (Set.range γ)`, while `BasedPath.lean:604-605` feeds it only via `SemilocallySimplyConnectedOn.of_semilocallySimplyConnectedSpace (Set.range α.toPath)`.
findings.fix: State the local theorem with `(hslsc : SemilocallySimplyConnectedOn (Set.range α.toPath))` and use it at line 604; keep a global corollary if desired.
findings.issue: `BasedPath.exists_open_nhd_pathComponent_preimage` assumes `[SemilocallySimplyConnectedSpace X]`, but the proof only needs SLSC along `Set.range α.toPath`.

findings.evidence: `SemilocallySimplyConnected.lean:941-942` calls `p.exists_partition_in_slsc_neighborhoods (SemilocallySimplyConnectedOn.of_semilocallySimplyConnectedSpace (Set.range p))`; the callee at `SemilocallySimplyConnected.lean:427-428` already has the local range hypothesis.
findings.fix: Generalize the signature to take `(hslsc : SemilocallySimplyConnectedOn (Set.range p))`, and derive the current global theorem as a wrapper for `Path.isOpen_setOf_homotopic`.
findings.issue: `Path.exists_open_tubular_neighborhood_in_homotopy_class` assumes `[SemilocallySimplyConnectedSpace X]`, but the tubular neighborhood construction only uses SLSC on `Set.range p`.

summary: Two exported neighborhood lemmas require global semilocal simple connectivity even though the proofs only use the existing local-on-range API.
